print('Hidden inputs:', hidden_inputs)"}

http_info_collect_2.stdout:
<?php


class UserInfo
{
    public $name = "";
    public $age = 0;
    public $blog = "";

    public function __construct($name, $age, $blog)
    {
        $this->name = $name;
        $this->age = (int)$age;
        $this->blog = $blog;
    }

    function get($url)
    {
        $ch = curl_init();

        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, 1);
        $output = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        if($httpCode == 404) {
            return 404;
        }
        curl_close($ch);

        return $output;
    }

    public function getBlogContents ()
    {
        return $this->get($this->blog);
    }

    public function isValidBlog ()
    {
        $blog = $this->blog;
        return preg_match("/^(((http(s?))\:\/\/)?)([0-9a-zA-Z\-]+\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,6}(\:[0-9]+)?(\/\S*)?$/i", $blog);
    }

}

code_evidence.snippet: class UserInfo { public $name; public $age; public $blog; function get($url) { $ch = curl_init(); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url); ... return $output; } public function getBlogContents() { return $this->get($this->blog); } public function isValidBlog() { return preg_match("/^(((http(s?))\:\/\/)?)([0-9a-zA-Z\-]+\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,6}(\:[0-9]+)?(\/\S*)?$/i", $blog); } }
code_evidence.why_it_matters: 暴露了UserInfo类的实现，get方法使用curl_exec无严格限制，isValidBlog正则存在绕过可能，可能导致SSRF漏洞。
code_evidence.exploit_hint: 尝试通过blog参数构造恶意URL，绕过正则限制（如使用file://协议或内网IP），利用getBlogContents触发SSRF。
